text: A security drill can be conducted in:

options.text: Combination with other exercises such as emergency response exercises
Only when the vessel is drydocked
Only under the supervision of a Port State surveyor

explanation: Security drills, as per ISPS Code guidelines, can often be combined with other mandatory drills, such as fire or abandon ship exercises, provided that the security aspects are adequately addressed. This integrated approach optimizes training time and enhances crew readiness for complex emergency scenarios.
